mechanism_narrative: A declining FEDFUNDS path lowers discount rates and eases financial conditions, so a lower or flat policy rate predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns are not higher after FEDFUNDS declines versus non-decline periods, or if the sign association turns negative in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening household income and demand, which pressures earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE rises are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average forward return after triggers is not below unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in RSAFS indicates stronger current consumer spending and revenue growth, which supports near-term equity earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS momentum does not coincide with positive 5d SPX returns more often than chance, or if the sign flips negative in sustained expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO falls while HOUST also weakens, the combination indicates broad cyclical production slowdown and future earnings pressure, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint decline in INDPRO and HOUST does not outperform either series alone in predicting negative 20d SPX returns, or if the interaction coefficient is indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A high FEDFUNDS level combined with elevated CPIAUCSL inflation signals restrictive real rates and policy pressure, which compresses equity multiples and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5% while CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation is rising
failure_condition: Reject if high-rate, rising-inflation triggers do not produce below-average 60d SPX returns, or if the interaction adds no predictive power beyond FEDFUNDS alone.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in GDPC1 after prior weakness signals improving aggregate demand and earnings visibility, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth turns positive after two consecutive weak quarters
failure_condition: Reject if GDP rebound periods fail to precede positive 60d SPX returns more often than baseline, or if the effect vanishes outside recovery episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE marks a labor-market deterioration that reduces consumption and earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS-UNRATE joint signal does not predict negative 5d SPX returns better than each series separately, or if the sign is unstable across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in HOUST after a prior trough signals housing-led demand stabilization and improved cyclical sentiment, which should generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST increases by more than 8% over 3 months after a prior 6-month decline
failure_condition: Reject if post-trough HOUST rebounds are not followed by above-average 20d SPX returns, or if the signal fails once housing stops leading cyclical turns.
